name: insurance brokers managing 10–20 vendors/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 10–20 vendors/month, lack of visibility into vendor certifications causes compliance issues. We provide a vendor management platform instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking vendor certifications and performance leads to compliance issues.
